problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
